INTRO.selection_rationale: Describes study purpose ("tiene como proposito describir") — no citations, no contribution declaration

BACK.selection_rationale: References prior work with "zhang et al 2019" — explicit citation, describes others' findings

METH.selection_rationale: Step-by-step methodology: "tipo descriptivo con diseno no experimental", instruments, data collection described

RES.selection_rationale: Numerical removal efficiencies: "eficiencias de remocion encontradas fueron 77.8% turbidez, 51.8% color..." — "los resultados muestran que"

DISC.selection_rationale: Interprets market integration findings; "lo que permitio abordar" signals inferential language from data

CONTR.selection_rationale: Explicit contribution proposal: "esta propuesta nacio de la necesidad" — concrete deliverable declared

LIM.selection_rationale: Future research lines section: "la presente tesis doctoral no haya podido abarcar", "seria interesante actualizar"

CONC.selection_rationale: Concludes study findings with "se puede concluir que todo parte del ajuste psicologico" — summary judgment
